title: I have a Wis Mesh Tag (RAK Wireless).

messages.author: Hugo
messages.text: Lol, you beat me to it while typing this up on phone. For posterity: iPhone or Android? I had issues with Bluetooth disconnects with my wife's iPhone but not with my Android phone (Pixel 7 Pro), also with WisMesh tags. For her iPhone I switched to https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pommecore/id6760626211 and confirmed that hasn't failed / disconnected unintentionally in testing. For GPS getting disabled on reboot, there is an open bug for it: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/866 For contacts: Do you have "auto add discovered contacts" enabled? It's generally simplest to turn that off and only add the contacts you want from the "discovered contacts" view. (edited)
messages.content_html:
Lol, you beat me to it while typing this up on phone. For posterity:
iPhone or Android? I had issues with Bluetooth disconnects with my wife's iPhone but not with my Android phone (Pixel 7 Pro), also with WisMesh tags. For her iPhone I switched to https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pommecore/id6760626211 and confirmed that hasn't failed / disconnected unintentionally in testing. For GPS getting disabled on reboot, there is an open bug for it: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/866 For contacts: Do you have "auto add discovered contacts" enabled? It's generally simplest to turn that off and only add the contacts you want from the "discovered contacts" view.
 (edited)
embeds_html:
PommeCore App - App Store
Download PommeCore by Michael Bedworth on the App Store. See screenshots, ratings and reviews, user tips, and more apps like PommeCore.

moko smart/WisMesh Tag needs ability to always send position · Iss...
Hi, it's great that meshcore can send a GPS position, but it stops after reboot. For a device like the Tag, it's important to have an option to always send it- e.g., to persist reboots.
